content.body:
- bootstrapAllChildRepos walks child dirs recursively, runs bootstrap
  on each repo (.git + .leo present), recurses into org folders
- Replaces single-dir scan that found no code at the user scope root
- Renamed "knowledge base" → "memory" in spinner and help text for
  consistency with v0.8+ terminology
content.subject: fix(init): bootstrap all child repos on user/org scope + rename KB refs
